confirm.title: Confirm Pivot Firmware
confirm.description:
Make sure **{device_name}** is running the Pivot firmware.

Enter the `device_suffix` you set in your firmware YAML. This must be unique across all your Pivot devices. It determines your entity IDs and cannot be changed without reflashing the firmware.

data.firmware_confirmed: I have flashed the Pivot firmware

data_description.device_suffix: Must match `device_suffix` in your firmware YAML exactly, e.g. `lounge` or `ha_voice_1`

options.title: Settings
options.description: Optionally configure a text-to-speech service and speaker for spoken announcements. When enabled, Pivot will announce bank names when you switch banks, re-announce on triple press, and speak entity values after the knob settles. These settings can be changed at any time.

data_description.tts_entity: Used for bank change, triple press, and value announcements. Also shared with the Timer blueprint automatically.
data_description.media_player_entity: The speaker used for all spoken announcements.
data_description.announcements: When on, Pivot announces bank names on bank change and triple press, and speaks entity values after the knob settles (per-bank Announce Value switches provide further control). Requires TTS and speaker to be configured.

banks_initial.title: Assign entities to banks
banks_initial.description: Assign a Home Assistant entity to each bank. You can leave banks empty and assign them later.

data_description.timer_banks: Timers are an optional add-on feature. If you want to use one, select which bank should act as a timer. That bank will be reserved for the Pivot — Timer blueprint — entity assignment is not used while a bank is set to timer, so any entity selected for that bank below will be ignored. See the Pivot docs for timer setup instructions.

abort.no_esphome_devices: No ESPHome devices found. Add your VPE in the ESPHome integration first.
abort.suffix_collision: Another Pivot entry already uses this device suffix.

error.cannot_read_device_name: Could not read ESPHome device name.
error.must_confirm_firmware: You must confirm the firmware is flashed before continuing.
error.suffix_collision: This device suffix is already in use by another Pivot device.
error.esphome_name_required: Please enter the ESPHome device name.

init.title: Settings
init.description: Optionally configure a text-to-speech service and speaker for spoken announcements. When enabled, Pivot will announce bank names when you switch banks, re-announce on triple press, and speak entity values after the knob settles. These settings can be changed at any time.

data_description.tts_entity: Used for bank change, triple press, and value announcements. Also shared with the Timer blueprint automatically.
data_description.media_player_entity: The speaker used for all spoken announcements.
data_description.announcements: When on, Pivot announces bank names on bank change and triple press, and speaks entity values after the knob settles (per-bank Announce Value switches provide further control). Requires TTS and speaker to be configured.

banks.title: Bank Entity Assignment
banks.description:
Assign a Home Assistant entity to each bank. All banks are optional — leave any empty to skip it.

**How it works:** in Control Mode, turn the knob to adjust the entity (brightness, volume, fan speed, etc.) and press the button to toggle it on/off.

**Scenes & scripts** activate on button press only — the knob does nothing for those.

data_description.timer_banks: Timers are an optional add-on feature. If you want to use one, select which bank should act as a timer. That bank will be reserved for the Pivot — Timer blueprint — entity assignment is not used while a bank is set to timer, so any entity selected for that bank below will be ignored. See the Pivot docs for timer setup instructions.
